# Purpose Productions

> A custom podcast and video studio in South Melbourne, Australia. Broadcast-grade podcast and video production for professionals — lawyers, founders, advisors and brand teams. Run by James Shadrach since 2017.

## Key facts

- Studio: Level 5, 111 Cecil Street, South Melbourne VIC 3205, Australia
- Podcast sessions: from $895 + GST per 60-minute recording session, all-inclusive (studio hire, full audio and video, producer, access to raw files)
- Up to 8 episodes can be recorded in one day
- Standard turnaround: first cut in 3–4 days; next-day available on request
- Video production: brand films, ads and social content — custom quoted
- Contact: info@purposeproductions.co or the enquiry form at https://www.purposeproductions.co/#contact

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.purposeproductions.co/): services, pricing, availability, featured work
- [Podcasting](https://www.purposeproductions.co/podcasting.html): the podcast offer, clip examples, FAQ
- [Video production](https://www.purposeproductions.co/video.html): case studies (Jimple, Cygnett, Hair and Skin Science, Maxiom Law, Apto)
- [About](https://www.purposeproductions.co/about.html): the studio and the team
